title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Marks & Spencer India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Marks & Spencer India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Marks & Spencer India! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Varanasi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Marks & Spencer India:
Marks & Spencer India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marks & Spencer India!
